name: Blue Prism
description: Blue Prism (SS&C) — enterprise-grade RPA platform with digital workforce management. Known for governance, security, and bank-level controls.

seo.title: Blue Prism — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Blue Prism: Blue Prism (SS&C) — enterprise-grade RPA platform with digital workforce management. Known for governance, security, and bank-level controls.

when_to_use: Enterprise RPA for governance-heavy financial services firms
Unattended bot operations with full audit trail and compliance
Digital workforce management across large enterprise processes
Secure credential vault for RPA bots interacting with systems
Process automation in regulated industries with full oversight

pros: Post-SS&C acquisition stability for enterprise buyers
cons: Heavier and slower to deploy than modern rivals
Licensing costs high for the capabilities offered
Lags on AI-agent and cloud-native features
review.verdict: Enterprise-grade but aging RPA platform; choose it for governance, not for developer velocity.
review.best_for: Regulated enterprises prioritizing governance, audit, and security controls
review.not_for: Dev-first teams or anyone wanting modern low-code and AI-first tooling

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
